title: WB, Day 37, PID 16
source_name_ch1: WB samples from subject 16 at Day 37
treatment_protocol_ch1: PAXgene preserved whole blood samples were centrifuged, resuspended in lysis buffer and treated with proteinase K.
extract_protocol_ch1: Total RNA was isolated by PAXgene Blood RNA kit (Qiagen) according to the manufacturer’s protocol. A DNAse treatment was applied on the PAXgene RNA spin column to avoid genomic DNA contamination. RNA was quantified by UV-spectrophotometry.
label_protocol_ch1: Biotinylated cDNA were prepared according to NuGen Ovation WB amplification protocol from 50ng total RNA
hyb_protocol: After fragmentation, 3.75 ug of cDNA were hybridized for 16 hr at 45C on GeneChip_ Human Genome U133 Plus 2.0 arrays following standard procedures.
scan_protocol: Data acquisition was performed using GeneChip Operating Software (Affymetrix).
data_processing: The data were analyzed with R/Bioconductor using GCRMA as summarization/normalization method

treatment_protocol_ch1: PBMC were thawed in RPMI medium, centrifuged and resuspended in RLT buffer (106 cells/350µl of lysis buffer - Qiagen).
extract_protocol_ch1: Total RNA was isolated by RNeasy™ Minikit (Qiagen) according to the manufacturer’s protocol. A DNAse treatment was applied on the RNeasy column to avoid genomic DNA contamination. RNA was quantified by Nanodrop DO.
label_protocol_ch1: Biotinylated cDNA were prepared according to NuGen Ovation RNA amplification system V2 (+ Ovation WB reagent) protocol from 50ng total RNA
hyb_protocol: After fragmentation, 3.75 ug of cDNA were hybridized for 16 hr at 45C on GeneChip_ Human Genome U133 Plus 2.0 arrays following standard procedures.
scan_protocol: Data acquisition was performed using GeneChip Operating Software (Affymetrix).
data_processing: The data were analyzed with R/Bioconductor using GCRMA as summarization/normalization method
